headline: UK may intervene in Paramount-Skydance’s $110B Warner Bros. Discovery deal
summary: The UK government has indicated it could intervene in Paramount-Skydance Corp (NASDAQ:PSKY)'s proposed $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros Discovery Inc (NASDAQ:WBD, XETRA:J5A), adding another layer of regulatory scrutiny to the media merger. UK Culture Secretary Lisa Nandy said Tuesday...

headline: British government may ‘intervene’ in Paramount’s takeover of Warner Bros.
summary: The British government suggested Tuesday it may challenge Paramount Skydance’s blockbuster $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros.

headline: Wall Street Lunch: Buffett Delays Gates Foundation Donation Amid Epstein Review
summary: Warren Buffett is holding off on his usual midyear donation to the Gates Foundation until he sees the results of a review into the foundation's ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

raw.headline: Wall Street Lunch: Buffett Delays Gates Foundation Donation Amid Epstein Review

headline: Paramount Resources Announces Closing of Fox Drilling Sale, Distribution of AKITA Drilling Shares and Successful Startup of Alhambra Expansion
summary: Paramount Resources Ltd. ("Paramount" or the "Company") (TSX: POU) is pleased to announce that it has closed the sale of its Fox Drilling subsidiary to AKITA Drilling Ltd. ("AKITA"). The Company is also pleased to announce that it has successfully started up the second phase expansion of its Alhambra Plant in Willesden Green.

raw.headline: Paramount Resources Announces Closing of Fox Drilling Sale, Distribution of AKITA Drilling Shares and Successful Startup of Alhambra Expansion
raw.summary: Paramount Resources Ltd. ("Paramount" or the "Company") (TSX: POU) is pleased to announce that it has closed the sale of its Fox Drilling subsidiary to AKITA Drilling Ltd. ("AKITA"). The Company is also pleased to announce that it has successfully started up the second phase expansion of its Alhambra Plant in Willesden Green.

headline: Paramount Skydance's $110 Billion WBD Deal Hits UK Regulatory Hurdle Despite US Approval
summary: The UK government may challenge Paramount Skydance’s (NASDAQ: PSKY) $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery (NASDAQ: WBD) over media plurality concerns. Read more on Benzinga.

headline: Why Is Comcast Stock Surging On Tuesday?
summary: Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) stock continued its upward momentum Tuesday following a major corporate restructuring plan to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky.
